description.value: Aura faint transmutation; CL 4th; Slot headband; Price 11,000 gp; Weight 1 lb. DESCRIPTION This simple headband of braided hide grants a +5 competence bonus on Survival checks and inures the wearer to the strain of long travel, as the tireless pursuit spell. If the wearer is a ranger, the hunterâs band increases his favored enemy bonus on attack rolls by +1 for all his favored enemies. If the ranger has the hunterâs bond (companions) class feature, this increase also applies to the attack roll bonus his allies gain from that ability. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, instant enemy, tireless pursuit; Special creator must have 5 ranks in Survival; Cost 5,500 gp.
